author: Office of the Municipal Assessor (Gemma P. Abla)
subject: No written disposition issued on the records request (no extension, no denial)
gap_flag: NO WRITTEN DISPOSITION — the Assessor neither issued a written extension fixing a release date nor a written denial; R.A. 11032 §21(d) requires a written notice of disapproval. Silence is not service.

proofs.quote: I never received a written extension fixing a new release date, and I never received a written denial

author: Office of the Municipal Assessor (Gemma P. Abla)
subject: Belated SPA/authorization objection raised six months after the request
gap_flag: BAD-FAITH DELAY — the authorization (SPA) objection was raised six months after the request, after fees were paid and the request partially processed; a delay tactic to frustrate release.

proofs.quote: Raising an alleged lack of authorization six months later is a bad-faith delay tactic designed to frustrate the release of public records

author: Office of the Municipal Treasurer (Loida E. Macale)
subject: Tax records remain unrendered ten+ months after payment
gap_flag: NON-RENDERING — the certified copies remain undelivered/unissued; the Treasurer's response (28 May 2026) is more than ten months and 200+ working days after payment — the service was never rendered.

proofs.quote: remain undelivered or unissued as of the date of this Reply-A ffidavit
Counter-A ffidavit is dated May 28, 2026: more than ten months later, and over two hundred (200) working days after I paid
